reviewsList.name: Joseph T Yohn
reviewsList.comment: I work in an old pub, and we have a few coolers with no lighting. We are always using our cell phones to look for inventory. These lights are a game changer and work inside the cooler, I’m very excited to see how these will hold up, I am very happy so far.

reviewsList.name: russ
reviewsList.comment: We went on a cruise last year and decided the next cruise there were things we still needed. These nightlights came with magnets that you stick on the back. A quick usb-c charge and it lasted almost all week on the cruise. I took all 3 charged so I didn’t have to recharge a lot, but the first one worked for 5 days so it was great. Light comes on when it senses motion across the room and turns off after 30 sec of no motion. Amazing

reviewsList.name: L@dybug
reviewsList.comment: I like this sensor light very much. It can be placed in my closet so that I can see the entire closet. It can also be placed in the restroom so that I don’t have to turn on the light when I get up at night to go to the restroom.

reviewsList.name: L@dybug
reviewsList.comment: I like this sensor light very much. It can be placed in my closet so that I can see the entire closet. It can also be placed in the restroom so that I don’t have to turn on the light when I get up at night to go to the restroom.

reviewsList.name: amgan
reviewsList.comment: I expected barely functional light given how cheap the packaging is. But the product is actually very decent. The sensor works just as expected, the lights are warm and comfortable, I installed it outside in the backyard. It works so well at night I can finally see ground. The charging is micro-usb, I wish it is usb-c, and the magnets sticker isn't too strong. I suppose you can't expect too much for 10 bucks. The sensor range and quality is the by far the most impressive part.

reviewsList.name: tt
reviewsList.comment: Received the lights, opened the box & the lights were already charged & ready for use! Comes with double sided sticky tape & a strong magnet so you can put them anywhere in your home. Lights last about a week depending on which setting you have them set to. Super easy to use, great value for the money spent & super happy with the quality of this product.

reviewsList.name: mylove
reviewsList.comment: Doorways in the bedrooms and hallways excellent

reviewsList.name: tk
reviewsList.comment: Needed a hallway light for when my daughter wakes up in the middle of the night. My apartment doesn’t have an outlet in the hallway for one of the outlet plug in lights so these were perfect to stick to the floor boards .

reviewsList.name: dominic
reviewsList.comment: I purchased the set of 3, it works as expected. It is the perfect size for you to put anywhere under the cabinets and stairs. Plus, they are all coming with motion sensors.

reviewsList.name: yan
reviewsList.comment: My stairway doesn’t have a plug and I want some light when I go upstairs. And I found this you can just stick it there and it is wireless. I can recharge it when it is low battery. It works great!

reviewsList.name: tom
reviewsList.comment: Just like my heading states. It gives light where you need it without wires and the constant need to replace regular batteries. I replaced 3 motion sensor lights that work with batteries with these rechargeable lights. Now I can save a bit of money on batteries.

reviewsList.name: leland
reviewsList.comment: These set of six lights 3 white and 3 warm. So far they working as described beautifully. The fact that I can recharge them in an hour or so is priceless. Batteries are a fortune now and space to save them! May even purchase a few more but for different areas.

reviewsList.name: jason
reviewsList.comment: The Auto Motion Sensor Night Light is a versatile and convenient lighting solution. It offers automatic motion detection, eye-friendly soft white light, and a long-lasting rechargeable battery. Easy to install anywhere, it's perfect for stairs, bedrooms, and more, and comes with a 100% money-back guarantee for added confidence.

reviewsList.name: Nara S. Lek
reviewsList.comment: Came fully charged, ready to use. Work fine so far.

reviewsList.name: kimi
reviewsList.comment: These lights are incredibly convenient with their motion-sensing feature, and the warm yellow glow adds a cozy ambiance to my outdoor space. The rechargeable battery and included USB cable make maintenance a breeze, and the magnetic patch allows for easy installation.

reviewsList.name: deaneski
reviewsList.comment: I love these lights so much! They are exactly what I was looking for. I was also surprised that they only turn on when it's dark and they automatically turn off during the daytime. They are very easy to charge as well.

reviewsList.name: flytt
reviewsList.comment:
The stairs don't have a light , it feel uncomfortable in night . We put this sensor. It really feel much better. I reserve one when light battery used up , can replace it right away
One person found this helpful

reviewsList.name: skye
reviewsList.comment: So got these lights to be able to put up on the wall and they only have magnetic backings and they do not stay together so if you stick a magnetic part onto the wall and attach the other magnet to the device they're supposed to be able to connect well it stays sticky and held for about 10 minutes it's not worth the aggravation and it's not worth the money

reviewsList.name: H
reviewsList.comment: Easy to install, portable, no switches, just walk by and they work, couldn't be easier

reviewsList.name: Roberto Antonio Garcia
reviewsList.comment: Excellent
